evals.prompt: Build a dashboard with a counter showing total orders and a bar chart of revenue by region from catalog.schema.fact_orders
evals.expected_output: Valid dashboard JSON with pageType PAGE_TYPE_CANVAS, counter widget with disaggregated false, bar chart with encodings

assertions.text: Counter widget uses disaggregated: false with aggregation expression
Bar chart has x and y encodings defined
All SQL queries are tested via execute_sql before dashboard creation

evals.prompt: Create a dashboard with a date range filter that controls a line chart showing daily revenue trend
evals.expected_output: Dashboard with date filter widget linked to line chart via field mapping

assertions.text: Filter widget references a date column
Line chart uses disaggregated false for filter reactivity
frame is inside spec, not on widget

evals.prompt: Add a text header widget saying 'Sales Overview' and a table showing top 10 customers by spend
evals.expected_output: Dashboard with multilineTextboxSpec text widget and table widget

assertions.text: Text widget uses multilineTextboxSpec with lines as markdown strings array
SQL includes ORDER BY and LIMIT 10
